---
title: "Food Consulting"
author: "Cooper Riggs & Stockton Nelson"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Setup

```{r}
#Downloading Libraries
library(tidyverse)

#Bringing in Data
food <- vroom::vroom("CompanyGrowth.csv") |>
  janitor::clean_names() |>
  rename(growth = pct_growth)
```

## Problem 1 (Adam)

### 2025 Predictions

```{r}

```

## Problem 2 (Cooper)

### 2 Other Models

```{r}

```

## Problem 3 (Cooper)

### Comparison of Models

```{r}

```

## Problem 4 (Stockton)

### Variables Relationship to Growth

```{r}

```
